title: Pan-Seared Duck with Rillettes Sauce
description: A rich and savory Chinese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared duck served with a creamy rillettes sauce.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the duck breast until browned on both sides.
Transfer the duck to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the duck is cooking, heat the rillettes in a saucepan over low heat.
Add the finely chopped shallots to the rillettes and stir to combine.
Stir in the soy sauce and honey until well combined.
To serve, slice the cooked duck breast and serve with the rillettes sauce spooned over the top.
